title: Tanium Endpoint
description: Represents a managed endpoint (computer, server, or device) in the Tanium platform. Endpoints are the primary entities that Tanium discovers, monitors, and manages across the enterprise.

id.description: Unique numeric identifier for the endpoint in Tanium

computerID.description: Tanium client identifier assigned to the endpoint

ipAddress.description: Primary IP address of the endpoint

ipAddresses.description: All IP addresses associated with the endpoint

macAddress.description: Primary MAC address of the endpoint

operatingSystem.description: Full operating system name and version

domainName.description: Active Directory or DNS domain name

lastRegistration.description: Timestamp of the last client registration with the Tanium server

taniumClientVersion.description: Version of the Tanium client installed on the endpoint

isVirtual.description: Whether the endpoint is a virtual machine

chassisType.description: Physical chassis type (Desktop, Laptop, Server, Virtual)

tags.description: Tags assigned to the endpoint for organization
